# ctxrot

> Understand your ReAct agent's context window and fight context rot.

## Overview

- [ctxrot](https://williambrach.github.io/ctxrot/index.md): Landing page — pitch, install, links.
- [Quickstart](https://williambrach.github.io/ctxrot/quickstart/index.md): Attach CtxRotCallback, run agent, open dashboard.

## Concepts

- [Overview](https://williambrach.github.io/ctxrot/concepts/index.md): What context rot is and how ctxrot detects it.
- [Export](https://williambrach.github.io/ctxrot/export/index.md): JSONL export in opentraces or native format.
- [Deep analysis](https://williambrach.github.io/ctxrot/deep-analysis/index.md): RLM-powered semantic rot analysis.

## Reference

- [CLI](https://williambrach.github.io/ctxrot/cli/index.md): CLI reference for dashboard / analyze / export / deep-analyze / reset.
